name: Quesadilla Crocodila
lore:
Lore of Quesadilla Crocodila
                                    


Quesadilla Crocodila is the main rival of Pipi Plants, also the biggest hater of nature animals by Camellia. He was posted on TikTok by @lifewatching1 and depicted as tough, crispy quesadilla armor with an alligator head.
